intent: Cautilus should record and surface its own self-dogfood result honestly before operators trust broader consumer runs.

reviewVariants.summary: Current evidence supports the narrow operator-facing claim: the self-dogfood run was recorded, the standing checks passed, and the report packet surfaces the result without introducing regressions or review findings. I agree with the automated accept-now recommendation for this claim, while treating stronger binary-surface or bundled-skill claims as out of scope for this report.
